creator: rfurda@wgss.net
text:
The system will not probe SMC 8216T ISA NIC's. Using a DOS utility,
they pass all the tests and do not conflict with each other. We have
tried using the hard and soft(ware) configuration, but both failed
in FreeBSD.

Using SMC's DOS utility the network cards are configued as follows:

ed0: 
IO:     0x300
IRQ:    10
RAM:    CC00

ed1:
IO:     0x280
IRQ:    3
RAM:    D000

Fix: 

unknown
How-To-Repeat: 
Install 2 type SMC8216T (16 bit) ISA NIC's.
boot a 2.2.5-RELEASE kernel
